title: [1.21.8 Update!] Butterflies and Dragonflies
description: This datapack adds 12 unique variants of Butterflies and Dragonflies into your world! You can catch them with a bugnet, or kill them to display thier bodies. Can you collect all 12?
body:
**Butterflies & Dragonflies** --- This datapack adds 12 unique variants of Butterflies and Dragonflies into your world! You can catch them in a *bugnet*, or kill them to display their bodies. *Butterflies:* --- There are 8 kinds of butterflies, and they can spawn almost anywhere other passive mobs can spawn. Here are the butterfly variants: - Apollo - Blue Morpho - Colorado Hairstreak - Clouded Sulphur - Malachite - Monarch - Red Lacewing - Zebra Longwing You can see what each of these types look like in the gallery. *Dragonflies:* --- There are 4 kinds of dragonflies, and they can spawn around rivers, swamps, and mangrove swamps. The dragonfly has a special ability to hover every little while. Here are the dragonly variants: - Blue Dasher - Eastern Pondhawk - Eight-Spotted Skimmer - Roseate Skimmer You can see what each of these types look like in the gallery. *Bugnet:* --- You can craft yourself a bugnet with two sticks and three string. Here is how to craft it: ![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43ff8ca0f2a3c8b0fbcd70183515fca1a0869fdb.png) Right-click on a butterfly or dragonly with a bugnet to catch it! The bugnet will be displayed as a "Filled Bugnet" and will tell you in the lore of the item what insect has been caught. You can right-click again to release your critter!. *Other Info:* --- Once the datapack is installed, operators can use the following commands to manually summon butterflies and dragonflies:
OP Commands --- **Summoning Butterflies** --- "/function butterfly:summon/butterfly/TYPE" - This summons the TYPE of butterfly you want. "/function butterfly:summon/butterfly/TYPE_persistent" - This summons the type of butterfly you want, however it will not despawn. --- "/function butterfly:summon/butterfly/random" This summons a random butterfly. "/function butterfly:summon/butterfly/random_persistent" This summons a random butterfly, however it will not despawn. --- **Summoning Dragonflies** --- "/function butterfly:summon/dragonfly/TYPE" - This summons the TYPE of dragonfly you want. "/function butterfly:summon/dragonfly/TYPE_persistent" - This summons the type of dragonfly you want, however it will not despawn. --- "/function butterfly:summon/dragonfly/random" This summons a random dragonfly. "/function butterfly:summon/dragonfly/random_persistent" This summons a random dragonfly, however it will not despawn. ---
Thank you! --- Looking for a Minecraft Server Host? Use my affilate link to try Shockbyte! https://shockbyte.com/billing/aff.php?aff=10878
